title: Legal Contract Data Extraction: Automate Document Review for Law Firms
metaTitle: Legal Contract Data Extraction Guide for Law Firms | GridPull
metaDescription: Learn how law firms automate contract review and data extraction from PDFs while maintaining 99%+ accuracy for compliance and legal workflows.
h1: Legal Contract Data Extraction: Automate Document Review for Law Firms

hero.headline: Extract Key Data from Legal Contracts in Minutes, Not Hours
hero.subheadline: Automate contract review and data extraction from PDFs and scanned documents while maintaining accuracy for critical legal information and compliance requirements.

summary: Legal contract data extraction automates the process of pulling key information from contracts, agreements, and legal documents. Law firms use this technology to convert contract PDFs into structured spreadsheets containing critical data like parties, dates, terms, and obligations, reducing manual review time while maintaining accuracy for compliance and case management.
whoItsFor: Law firms handling high-volume contract review
Legal operations teams managing contract databases
whenThisIsRelevant: Processing dozens of contracts for due diligence reviews
Creating contract databases for compliance tracking
Extracting key terms from legacy paper contracts
supportedInputs: Scanned paper contracts converted to PDF
Photos of contract pages taken with mobile devices
expectedOutputs: Excel spreadsheets with contract data organized by document
CSV files containing extracted terms, dates, and party information
commonChallenges: Manual contract review takes hours per document
Inconsistent data extraction leads to missed critical terms
Legacy contracts stored as scanned PDFs are difficult to search
Creating contract databases requires significant manual data entry
howItWorksSteps: Upload contract PDFs or scanned documents to the platform
Select fields to extract like party names, effective dates, and key terms
AI processes documents using OCR for scanned contracts
Review and download structured Excel files with extracted contract data
whyPdfExcelAiFits: Processes both digital and scanned contract PDFs automatically
Extracts custom legal fields specific to contract types
Batch processing handles multiple contracts simultaneously
99%+ accuracy on clear documents reduces review time significantly
limitations: Very complex multi-page contract tables may require manual verification
Heavily redacted contracts will have missing field data
Handwritten annotations have limited recognition compared to typed text

faq.question: How accurate is AI extraction for legal contract data?
faq.answer: GridPull achieves 99%+ accuracy on clear digital contracts. Scanned documents depend on image quality, and complex legal formatting may require manual review of extracted data.

faq.question: Can I extract custom fields specific to my contract types?
faq.answer: Yes, you can define custom fields for specific contract elements like termination clauses, liability caps, or governing law provisions beyond standard party and date information.

faq.question: What happens to sensitive contract data after processing?
faq.answer: All uploaded contracts are encrypted during processing and automatically deleted from GridPull servers after extraction is complete to maintain attorney-client privilege.

faq.question: Does this work with old scanned contracts from paper files?
faq.answer: Yes, GridPull uses OCR technology to extract data from scanned contract PDFs and document photos, though accuracy depends on scan quality and document condition.

trustSignals: Files encrypted and deleted after processing
Supports both digital and scanned legal documents
Free trial available to test with your contracts
